title: Regular Donor
description: Join as a regular donor and support continuous welfare activities.
top_notice: For automatic contribution support, contact us at autopay@minhafoundation.org

intro_paragraphs: Regular donation helps us sustain food support, education, and emergency assistance year-round.
Your recurring contribution allows us to plan long-term projects with confidence.
Every amount, big or small, makes a meaningful impact in the lives of disadvantaged families.
left.auto_description: Enable monthly or daily recurring support and help us serve communities consistently.

form.title: Join With Us All of Our Charity Work
form.description: Fill out your information and complete your donation securely.
